title: Assertion failure at `rel2bin_select` when using `STARTSWITH`
description: The following test case crashed the monetdb server. Not sure if it's related to https://github.com/MonetDB/MonetDB/issues/7556. The previous one works well on my tested verion.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INTEGER, c1 VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, c2 DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
CREATE VIEW v0 AS SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE c0 > 1;
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN v0 ON CONTAINS(t1.c1, v0.c1);
key_bug_features: Assertion failure with STARTSWITH function in query
